# ProcessCapability.Grant

**Structure**

An object that represents a granted capability.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Grant
```

## Testing and changing validity

- **isValid**: A Boolean that indicates whether the operating system has granted the capability to the browser extension process.
- **invalidate()**: Invalidates the grant, removing the capability from the process it was granted to.

## Granting capabilities to browser extension processes

- **ProcessCapability.background**: The operating system permits the helper extension process to run in the background to finish work.
- **ProcessCapability.foreground**: The operating system permits the helper extension process to run at foreground priority to work on behalf of the browser app.
- **ProcessCapability.suspended**: The operating system permits the helper extension process to remain resident in a suspended state.
- **ProcessCapability.mediaPlaybackAndCapture(environment:)**: The helper extension process may access media hardware required for media capture and playback.
